name: Feed Router
description: Generates Atom XML feed for centaur.tools, aggregating recent tools and forum threads into a single feed sorted by creation date. Limits to 50 most recent entries total.

types.name: APIRouter
types.description: FastAPI router instance for feed endpoints

functions.name: _iso
functions.description: Converts a datetime object to ISO 8601 format string. If datetime is naive (no timezone), attaches UTC timezone before conversion.
postconditions: If input datetime is naive, result includes UTC timezone (+00:00 suffix)
If input datetime is timezone-aware, preserves original timezone in output

functions.name: _text_el
functions.description: Creates an XML subelement with text content under a parent element. Returns the created element.

inputs.name: tag
inputs.description: Tag name for the new element

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: Text content for the new element

postconditions: Parent element is mutated to contain a new child with the specified tag
Child element's text property is set to the provided text
Returns the newly created child element
side_effects: Mutates parent Element by adding a child

structured_side_effects.description: Adds a child element to parent

functions.name: _build_feed
functions.description: Constructs an Atom XML feed from tools and forum threads. Merges both lists, sorts by created_at descending, limits to 50 entries, and returns complete Atom XML document as string.

inputs.name: tools
inputs.description: List of Tool model instances with id, name, slug, created_at, description, and author attributes

inputs.name: threads
inputs.description: List of ForumThread model instances with id, title, created_at, body, and author attributes

error_cases.name: AttributeError
error_cases.condition: Tool or ForumThread objects missing required attributes (id, name/title, created_at, slug, description/body, author)

error_cases.name: AttributeError
error_cases.condition: Author object missing display_name or username attributes

postconditions: Returns valid Atom XML string with UTF-8 declaration
Feed contains at most 50 entries total
Entries are sorted by created_at in descending order
Feed updated timestamp matches most recent entry, or current time if no entries
Tool descriptions and thread bodies are truncated to 500 characters
Author names default to 'unknown' if author is None

functions.name: atom_feed
functions.description: FastAPI endpoint handler that queries active tools and forum threads from database, generates Atom XML feed, and returns it with application/atom+xml content type.

inputs.name: db
inputs.description: Database session injected via FastAPI Depends(get_db)

error_cases.name: DatabaseError
error_cases.condition: Database connection fails or query execution fails

error_cases.name: AttributeError
error_cases.condition: Tool or ForumThread models missing expected attributes

postconditions: Returns FastAPI Response with content-type application/atom+xml
Response body contains valid Atom XML
Includes up to 50 active tools (is_active==True) with author preloaded
Includes up to 50 forum threads with author preloaded
Results are sorted by created_at descending
side_effects: Reads from Tool and ForumThread database tables

structured_side_effects.description: Executes two SELECT queries with joins to fetch tools and threads

invariants: Feed subtitle is always 'Community-governed registry for AI tools'

data_access.rationale: Read-only endpoint that queries database for feed generation. Loads Tool.author and ForumThread.author relationships via selectinload.

side_effects.rationale: Fetches most recent 50 active tools and 50 forum threads with author information for feed generation

authority.rationale: Read-only feed endpoint with no ownership of data domains
